zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York於1341年6月5日出生在英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香時，他的父親Edward III King of England28歲，母親Philippa de Hainault Queen of England27歲。他於1372年7月11日與Isabella de Castilla在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1402年8月1日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾金斯 明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York于1341年6月5日出生在英国賀特福爾金也斯 明日香时，他的父亲Edward III King of England28岁，母亲Philippa de Hainault Queen of England27岁。他于1372年7月11日与Isabella de Castilla在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1402年8月1日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾金斯 明日香。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York was born on 5 June 1341, in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Edward III King of England, was 28 and his mother, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, was 27. He married Isabella de Castilla on 11 July 1372, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 August 1402, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York est né le 5 juin 1341, à King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward III King of England, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Castilla le 11 juillet 1372, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 août 1402, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York am 5. Juni 1341 in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward III King of England 28 und seine Mutter Philippa de Hainault Queen of England 27. Er hat am 11. Juli 1372 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Isabella de Castilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York è nato il il 5 giugno 1341 nel King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Edward III King of England, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Castilla il 11 luglio 1372, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of Yorkが1341年6月5日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ラングリーで生まれた時，父Edward III King of Englandは28歳，母Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandは27歳であった。1372年7月11日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでIsabella de Castillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年8月1日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキングズ ラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York(이)가 1341년 6월 5일 영국 허트퍼드실르 킨그'스 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward III King of England(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1372년 7월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Isabella de Castilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 8월 1일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 킨그스 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York nasceu em 5 de junho de 1341, em King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward III King of England, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Castilla em 11 de julho de 1372, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1402, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York родился 5 июня 1341 г. в местности кинг'с лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward III King of England было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Castilla 11 июля 1372 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 августа 1402 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности кингс лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.5 June 1341–1 August 1402: 5 de junio de 1341–1 de agosto de 1402
es.Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England: Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York nació el 5 de junio de 1341, en King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward III King of England, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Isabella de Castilla el 11 de julio de 1372, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1402, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
